'''jasanga''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:podcatcher|podcatcher]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-s-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:podcatcher|podcatcher]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| jasanga
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:jæsængæth|jæsængæth]] || [[word:jæsængæj|jæsængæj]] || [[word:jæsængæsh|jæsængæsh]] || [[word:jæsængæ|jæsængæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:jasasangath|jasasangath]] || [[word:jasasangaj|jasasangaj]] || [[word:jasasangash|jasasangash]] || [[word:jasasanga|jasasanga]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:jasangath|jasangath]] || [[word:jasangaj|jasangaj]] || [[word:jasangash|jasangash]] || [[word:jasanga|jasanga]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:jasafngath|jasafngath]] || [[word:jasafngaj|jasafngaj]] || [[word:jasafngash|jasafngash]] || [[word:jasafngaf|jasafngaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:jasangatha|jasangatha]] || [[word:jasangaja|jasangaja]] || [[word:jasangasha|jasangasha]] || [[word:jasangaka|jasangaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:jasangath|jasangath]] || [[word:jasangaj|jasangaj]] || [[word:jasangash|jasangash]] || [[word:jasanga|jasanga]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:jasangathal|jasangathal]] || [[word:jasangajal|jasangajal]] || [[word:jasangashal|jasangashal]] || [[word:jasangakal|jasangakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:jasangathatha|jasangathatha]] || [[word:jasangajaja|jasangajaja]] || [[word:jasangashasha|jasangashasha]] || [[word:jasangaka|jasangaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:jasangathan|jasangathan]] || [[word:jasangajan|jasangajan]] || [[word:jasangashan|jasangashan]] || [[word:jasangakan|jasangakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:jasangathaoro|jasangathaoro]] || [[word:jasangajaoro|jasangajaoro]] || [[word:jasangashaoro|jasangashaoro]] || [[word:jasangakaoro|jasangakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|dcef9d8}}
